description: Canonical in-bundle copy of the operator-supplied future outcomes input used to materialize benchmark labels.

required_fields.name: entity_id
required_fields.description: Stable entity identifier from the source outcomes input.

required_fields.name: outcome_date
required_fields.description: Observed outcome date in the source outcomes input.

required_fields.name: label_source
required_fields.description: Source system or process that supplied the outcome label.

optional_fields.name: label_notes
optional_fields.description: Optional notes attached to the source outcome row.
